tool_idea: 8p2 Internal Ops Agent: agentic pipeline that auto-ingests SCADA data, runs PVPAT/WINDPAT, renders the client PDF, and dispatches the report pack — eliminating manual monthly reporting steps across the solar and wind portfolio.

8p2 Report Factory: scheduling layer on top of PVPAT and WINDPAT that automates recurring monthly data ingestion, chart generation, and PDF delivery — removing repetitive analyst coordination steps on recurring advisory mandates.

8p2 Meeting-to-Action Copilot: captures client site-visit or kick-off call notes and auto-generates a structured action log, open-question register, and follow-up email draft — relevant for DD kick-offs, O&M review calls, and lender reporting.

Internal developer accelerator for the 8p2 data-products team: AI pair-programming on PVPAT, WINDPAT, and BESS pipeline code to speed up feature delivery and reduce regression risk as new SCADA connectors and report pages are added.

O&M and PPA contract reviewer for 8p2 DD mandates: AI extraction of key obligations, performance guarantees, curtailment caps, and termination clauses — accelerating the contract-review workstream in solar and wind acquisitions.

Renewables financial model reviewer: AI assistant that checks energy-yield-to-revenue assumptions in project finance models against 8p2 SCADA benchmarks, flags inconsistent loss stacks or degradation curves before lender submission.
Technical talent screener for renewables advisory: AI-assisted CV and assessment screening for solar/wind/BESS engineers — relevant as 8p2 and Dolfines scale data-services and advisory headcount.

PVPAT Copilot: extend the 8p2 solar SCADA pipeline with AI-assisted fault triage, monthly PR-vs-budget variance commentary, satellite irradiance screening, and auto-drafted owner's-engineering PDF delivery — turning a manual recurring service into a scalable data product.

WINDPAT Copilot: add NLP fault-code enrichment, power-curve degradation detection, RPM/pitch anomaly classification, and auto-drafted narrative to the 8p2 wind SCADA report pipeline — replacing manual commentary on recurring wind performance mandates.

BESS Technical Review Copilot: SOH-adjusted capacity forecasting, dispatch back-testing against price curves, augmentation timing optimiser, and commissioning document checker — covering all four phases of the 8p2 BESS advisory workflow in one AI-assisted workbench.

Advisory mandate tracker: AI-assisted status reporting for 8p2 advisory projects — auto-summarising open actions, milestone delays, and client dependencies from email and document context, reducing internal coordination overhead.

8p2 DD Copilot: data-room document classifier and gap-list generator, yield-report analyser (P50/P90, loss stack, curtailment), cross-technology red-flag synthesis, and IC memo drafter — covering the full technical DD workflow for solar, wind, and BESS acquisitions.

8p2 Report Factory: automated cron-driven PVPAT/WINDPAT pipeline with variance commentary engine, multi-site portfolio rollup, and client-portal PDF delivery — scaling the 8p2 recurring analytics service without proportional headcount growth.

8p2 Tender Copilot: scope extractor from RFP documents, precedent-matcher to past 8p2 mandates, technical section drafter pre-filled with PVPAT/WINDPAT methodology, and bid qualification scorer — reducing bid preparation time for solar, wind, and BESS advisory tenders.

8p2 Knowledge Assistant: internal RAG system over 8p2 methodology documents, past reports, and technical templates — enabling analysts to instantly retrieve past mandate assumptions, benchmark values, and methodology precedents rather than searching shared drives.

8p2 internal RAG infrastructure: retrieval layer over PVPAT/WINDPAT outputs, past DD reports, and methodology documents — the technical foundation enabling the DD Copilot, Tender Copilot, and Knowledge Assistant products to cite source material accurately.
